page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 4 dedicated physical cores using the AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at 3.4 GHz, paired with 16.0 GB of system memory. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external storage options, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the processor demonstrates top-tier single-core performance, ranking in the top 10% for stress-ng single-core CPU tests. Multi-core performance, PassMark CPU scores, and large-block memory bandwidth read and write speeds fall within the average range. However, the instance exhibits weaker performance in cached small-block memory bandwidth, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, and static web serving throughput, which rank in the bottom 25%.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.g8ae.xlarge offers predictable compute performance for general-purpose workloads. It is well-suited for applications requiring strong single-threaded CPU performance, such as lightweight application servers, background processing tasks, and development environments, though its lower database operation benchmarks and lack of local storage make it less optimal for high-throughput database hosting.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 physical cores operating at 3.4 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, paired with 16.0 GB of RAM. It operates on the KVM hypervisor, lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Benchmark data highlights top-tier single-core CPU performance, placing it in the top 10% of tested instances, while multi-core operations, encryption, and large-block memory bandwidth perform at average levels. Conversely, the instance shows weaker results in cached small-block memory bandwidth and database operations. This hardware profile makes the ecs.g8ae.xlarge highly suitable for general-purpose workloads, single-threaded applications, and lightweight web serving, offering a balanced resource allocation without the overhead of local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 4 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 16 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps network speed, delivering top-tier single-core CPU performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.xlarge features 4 dedicated AMD EPYC cores and 16 GB RAM, delivering top-tier single-core performance for general workloads.
tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC instance delivering top-tier single-core performance and balanced memory for general-purpose compute workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by 4 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 physical cores at 3.4 GHz
Equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory and 4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Top-tier single-core CPU performance ranking in the top 10%
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Best suited for general-purpose workloads, single-threaded tasks, and development environments
